label_source: Layer-1 resolve pattern cmp,vp,vpc,naive = L,W,W,_ : cmplog BLOCKS, value_profile + value_profile_cmplog RESOLVE, naive non-decisive. The only technique delta between the involved winner (vp/vpc) and loser (cmplog) is value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient feedback (both carry the same I2S substitution mutator). The shape's Layer-1 attribution is therefore VP CMP_MAP gradient; this test is the INDEPENDENT real-data verification (G2) of HOW that gradient advantage manifests.
round0_refuted: Round-0 bet the whole shape on ONE story: VP's gradient closes scalar value-DISTANCE at the gate operand (measured via value_distance_reached -> vp_min_distance << cmp_min_distance). The deterministic arbiter scored that against real seeds for all 9 branches and NONE held (rule_not_met for every branch). Conclusion: the VP-resolving seed set does NOT land at a smaller residual Hamming/prefix distance to a fixed gate operand than the cmplog-blocking set. The scalar-distance-closure mechanism is empirically REFUTED for this shape and is NOT re-proposed here.

hypotheses.label: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient drives corpus admission toward structurally larger / more-token-rich seeds: the VPC-resolving corpus physically CONTAINS more of the gate's required structural tokens (and is larger) than the cmplog-blocking corpus, because the gradient rewards partial assembly that edge-only feedback discards. This is a STRUCTURAL-ASSEMBLY / token-availability advantage, NOT scalar value-distance.

measurement.tool_mode: analyze_pair(winner_fz=value_profile_cmplog, loser_fz=cmplog) -- LWW_ has NO plain value_profile blocking seeds, so the joint i2s_necessary/vp_tags arm is N/A; the discriminating contrast is the W=VPC-resolving vs L=cmplog-blocking pair the tool's analyze_pair mode already emits as winner_/loser_/tag_lift/size_lift.

tokens_by_target.sqlite3_14493: .,X.Y,X.Y.Z dotted-qualifier structure -- pass --tokens as the dotted-reference markers (literal '.' separators between identifiers; SQL keywords SELECT/FROM as structural anchors). The gate needs a 3-part schema-qualified name X.Y.Z -> count of '.'-joined identifier groups is the token signal.
tokens_by_target.harfbuzz_6025: the three required little-endian codepoint words 0x0930 (30 09 00 00), 0x094D (4d 09 00 00), 0x0907 (07 09 00 00) -- count of these adjacent codepoint tokens present.
tokens_by_target.harfbuzz_6048: the codepoint words 0x0A72 (72 0a 00 00) and the cur(1) members {0x0A3F,0x0A40,0x0A47} -- count of the matched-pair codepoint tokens present.
tokens_by_target.harfbuzz_6037: the single codepoint word 0x0A72 (72 0a 00 00) -- count present (single-token; weak token signal, leans on size_lift).

params.scope: ON-DISK CORPUS + SEEDS REQUIRED. DB-confirmed seed sets exist ONLY for harfbuzz_6025 (W=10/L=19), harfbuzz_6037 (W=6/L=10), harfbuzz_6048 (W=8/L=28), sqlite3_14493 (W=5/L=30). All four are W=value_profile_cmplog vs L=cmplog. The other 5 branches have ZERO seeds in db/blockers.sqlite (see vp_advantage_no_corpus_unmeasurable).

hypotheses.prediction: tag_lift = winner_tags - loser_tags >= 1.0 OR size_lift = winner_size/loser_size >= 1.3 : the VPC-resolving seed set carries at least one MORE of the gate's required structural tokens than the cmplog-blocking set, and/or is >=30% larger. This is DISCRIMINATING vs the refuted scalar-distance story AND vs a pure-I2S story: (1) it is independent of residual Hamming distance to any single operand -- it counts whole-token PRESENCE and assembly EXTENT, which round-0's distance metric did not; (2) cmplog carries the IDENTICAL I2S substitution mutator, so if the divergence were an I2S byte-substitution advantage the two seed sets would place tokens equally (tag_lift ~ 0, size_lift ~ 1.0). A positive tag_lift / size_lift is the signature uniquely attributable to VP's gradient-driven admission of more-assembled corpus members. ALTERNATIVE RULED OUT: 'cmplog already assembles the same structure, just stalls on a final scalar' -> would show tag_lift ~ 0 AND size_lift ~ 1.0.

hypotheses.label: secondary / corroborant: for the exact-codepoint conjunction gates, value_profile's gradient enriches the VPC corpus for the target operand bytes (vs decoy bytes) at the gate site, because near-miss codepoints register as new coverage and steer the corpus toward the exact operand.

params.scope: harfbuzz_6025 (0x0930/0x094D/0x0907), harfbuzz_6037 (0x0A72), harfbuzz_6048 (0x0A72 + {0x0A3F,0x0A40,0x0A47}) -- the contiguous/multibyte-literal codepoint gates. sqlite3_14493 EXCLUDED (its tokens are an assembled dotted STRUCTURE, not a fixed-offset byte literal -> byte_freq_ratio mis-applies).
params.caveat: operand_enrichment is anchored cmplog-vs-naive at a FIXED gate offset; here the codepoint operands sit at VARIABLE glyph indices (dispersed_multibyte for 6025/6048) and are short (2-byte 0x0A72 -> width<=2 chance-alignment risk flagged by the tool). Treat as CORROBORANT only; it does not stand alone as the verdict.

hypotheses.prediction: signed_target_enrich > 0 (and > decoy_enrich): the VPC-resolving corpus is enriched for the target codepoint bytes relative to decoy bytes at the gate site. Discriminating: a no-VP-advantage (pure-I2S) corpus would show signed_target_enrich ~ 0 (I2S substitutes the operand on demand without persistently enriching the saved corpus for near-misses). RULED OUT: chance co-occurrence -> would not exceed decoy_enrich.

hypotheses.label: honest non-discriminable: the 5 libpng/libxml2 branches have NO on-disk corpus and NO resolving/blocking seeds in db/blockers.sqlite, so NO built seed/corpus tool (joint_necessity, operand_enrichment, value_distance_reached) can score them. depth_reach also needs the seed sets it runs through the cov image, so it cannot stand as an INDEPENDENT (G2) signal here either. There is no built measurement that can discriminate VP's mechanism for these branches.
hypotheses.prediction: N/A -- no built measurement applies (confirmed: 0 resolving_seeds + 0 blocking_seeds in db/blockers.sqlite for all 5; libpng/libxml2 are not in the on-disk corpus target set {curl,harfbuzz,openthread,sqlite3}).
hypotheses.rule: decidable:false -> these branches carry the Layer-1 VP-gradient label but get NO independent confirmation; the arbiter must leave them inconclusive (fallback).

data_realities_respected: value_profile (CMP_MAP) is a FEEDBACK not a mutator -> NOT measured via any seed_lineage 'gradient event'. Its effect is read off the corpus the gradient ADMITTED -- structural size + token count (joint_necessity) and operand byte enrichment (operand_enrichment) -- both corpus-state computes, no lineage event.
I2S is NOT tagged in mutation_op -> NO seed_lineage:event_cooccurrence on an I2S event proposed.

on-disk corpora exist ONLY for curl,harfbuzz,openthread,sqlite3 -> only harfbuzz_6025/6037/6048 + sqlite3_14493 are seed-measurable; the 5 libpng/libxml2 branches are honestly marked decidable:false (confirmed 0 seeds in DB).

LWW_ has NO plain value_profile arm in the corpus (value_profile RESOLVES, so no value_profile BLOCKING seeds) -> joint_necessity is used in analyze_pair(VPC vs cmplog) mode, NOT its 3-arm joint i2s_necessary mode (vp_tags is N/A here). The discriminating contrast is winner(VPC) vs loser(cmplog) tag_lift/size_lift.

the structural-assembly / dotted-structure operands are NOT fixed-offset byte literals, so byte_freq_ratio is applied ONLY to the contiguous codepoint gates (6025/6037/6048) as a corroborant, never to sqlite3's assembled X.Y.Z structure.
notes:
DROPPED both round-0 hypotheses (vp_gradient_value_distance_climb via value_distance_reached, and the depth_reach corroborant). Round-0's scalar value-DISTANCE-closure story was scored against real seeds and refuted for all 9 branches (none met vp_min_distance << cmp_min_distance). This round proposes a GENUINELY DIFFERENT mechanism, not a reword: VP's advantage here is STRUCTURAL-ASSEMBLY / TOKEN-AVAILABILITY -- the gradient admits corpus members that physically CONTAIN more of the required tokens and are larger, rather than landing at a smaller scalar residual to one operand. Re-reading the 9 mechanism_summaries supports this: every one describes ASSEMBLY (steer a state machine to ']'/neutral; build a multi-child (a|b) content tree -> non-NULL c2; assemble an X.Y.Z dotted reference -> non-null zDb; co-locate 3 adjacent codepoints / a matched codepoint PAIR), i.e. composing structure, not minimizing a distance.

WHY size/token, not distance, can still hold after distance failed: a seed can be FAR in Hamming residual from any single fixed operand yet still be larger and carry the discrete tokens the gate needs placed at the right adjacency -- the two metrics are orthogonal. Round-0 measured proximity; this measures presence+extent.

DISCRIMINABILITY HONESTY (G1/G3): H1 (vp_admits_token_richer_assembly) is the primary, decidable for the 4 on-disk branches via the BUILT joint_necessity analyze_pair mode (reuse, no new tool). H2 (vp_enriches_gate_operand_bytes) is a decidable-but-marginal corroborant for the 3 harfbuzz codepoint gates via the BUILT operand_enrichment (dispersed/short-operand caveat -> ranked second). H3 covers the 5 libpng/libxml2 no-corpus branches as decidable:false -- an HONEST non-discriminable, since 0 seeds means every built seed/corpus tool returns nothing and depth_reach (also seed-driven) would not be G2-independent. I am NOT re-proposing a measurement the data can't support for those 5.

NO NEW DESCRIPTOR NEEDED: both decidable hypotheses reuse a BUILT registry tool by descriptor_key (joint_necessity = seed_set:struct_size_and_token_count:tokens:per_branch; operand_enrichment = corpus_queue:byte_freq_ratio:target_vs_decoy:per_gate_offset). The only adaptation is using joint_necessity's existing analyze_pair entry point (winner=value_profile_cmplog, loser=cmplog) instead of its 3-arm joint mode, because LWW_ lacks a plain value_profile blocking arm -- no code change, the entry point already exists.

EXPECTED OUTCOME RANGE: harfbuzz_6025/6048 + sqlite3_14493 are multi-token conjunction/structure gates -> most likely to show tag_lift>=1 or size_lift>=1.3 (H1 confirms). harfbuzz_6037 is a SINGLE 0x0A72 codepoint -> weak token signal, may rely on size_lift or fall to H2/inconclusive. If H1 and H2 both fail for a seed-bearing branch, the VP advantage is genuinely not structural-assembly either, and that branch falls to inconclusive (a correct G3 outcome -- do not chase 100%).
